stonetop.summary: A tiny incarnate spirit that grants unasked-for wishes — and spreads chaos in the granting.

system.concept: A tiny incarnate spirit that grants unasked-for wishes — and spreads chaos in the granting.
system.description: The book's worked example of an imprisoned incarnation: a great spirit that took on flesh to make dreams and desires come true, but which in truth spreads chaos — which is why Stormcatcher locked it away. It manifests as a tiny, beautiful nightingale, tethered to a particular ever-blooming rose bush somewhere in the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.61j2hjMjANZcniEQ]{Foothills}. Set it loose, and it becomes a threat (an affliction) that spreads chaos throughout the region.
